title: elaeagnus multiflora var. hortensis
intro: Elaeagnus multiflora var. hortensis, also known as Silverberry or Wolfberry, is a type of flowering shrub native to Asia, characterized by its silvery-gray leaves and small white flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues, fever, and wounds. The health benefits of Elaeagnus multiflora var. hortensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
